title: Scylla: Corrected Byte-Exact Tokenizer Path
author: simon-marcus

data.description: Byte-native tokenizer regime with capcode=0, charset=none, normalization=none, and explicit 0x00..0xFF byte fallback coverage
Interpret charset:none TokenMonster decoded strings as raw bytes via latin-1 instead of utf-8
Insert a synthetic zero-byte BOS token at dataset/export time to preserve document boundaries exactly

novel_contributions: Byte-native TokenMonster regime for FineWeb validation text
Exact byte-accounting metadata and audit artifacts
Full-validation exactness with zero drift and zero bad documents
Synthetic zero-byte BOS handling for flat shard export
